hooks.command: filepath=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -o '"file_path":\s*"[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed 's/.*"\([^"]*\)"/\1/'); if echo "$filepath" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$'; then echo '--- TypeCheck ---'; npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -20; fi
if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'rm\s+-rf'; then echo 'BLOCKED: rm -rf is not allowed. Use targeted file deletion instead.'; exit 2; fi
